blocks.text: That split works. I will have the source pack finished by Thursday. Two figures still need a source before I will call them verified, and both sit on the {{fact:f:E-2023-001.client}} revenue history rather than anything current, so they should not hold up the framework.

On the client questions, I have three so far that only Jennifer Herrera can settle, all on the Suarez-Jones side where the record runs thin. I will write them up tight for the single batch John Macias wants to send, so nothing goes over piecemeal. Thursday afternoon works to walk the framework once the pack is clean.
